title: Pro.Hibited
description: The Pro.Hibited universe — parody, haze and creative chaos

comboRules.title: 420 — The Legendary Haze
comboRules.text: Intergalactic jackpot. You are officially appointed Ambassador of the Haze for the evening. Trophy and immunity granted.
comboRules.characterComment: THE FOUR-TWENTY! The air suddenly feels unusually dense.

comboRules.title: Suspicious Triple Heart
comboRules.text: Declare your love to your favourite imaginary houseplant. Describe it, name it and accept the applause.
comboRules.characterComment: Three hearts. Apparently herbs have feelings too.

comboRules.title: Absolute Total Haze
comboRules.text: Everyone closes their eyes and describes what they can see inside the fog. No censorship.
comboRules.characterComment: I cannot see anything. It is beautiful. Has anyone seen my keys?

comboRules.title: Triple Pro.Hibited
comboRules.text: Everyone confesses one thing officially forbidden in their family that they still do cheerfully.
comboRules.characterComment: Three times Pro.Hibited. The evening has entered a new legal dimension.

comboRules.title: Strategic Four-Four-Four
comboRules.text: Present a forty-five-second business plan for optimising aromatic herb production on a city balcony.
comboRules.characterComment: The maths is hazy, but the ambition is crystal clear.

comboRules.title: Triple Two — The Double Rule
comboRules.text: For the next two rounds, everything you do must be done twice. Speaking, sipping, laughing. Everything.
comboRules.characterComment: Two times two times two. I repeat: two times two times two.

comboRules.title: The Great Pro Void
comboRules.text: Stay completely silent and motionless for exactly fifteen seconds. Anyone who moves must explain their life plan.

comboRules.title: The Cosmic Trio
comboRules.text: Invent a fictional medicinal herb strain, its supposed relaxing properties and its imaginary price per gram.
comboRules.characterComment: Love, haze and prohibition. The holy trinity of Pro.Hibited.

comboRules.title: Four Hazy Hearts
comboRules.text: Mime someone who has been looking for their keys in thick fog for twenty minutes. No speaking.
comboRules.characterComment: I have seen this before. It was surprisingly artistic.

comboRules.title: Two-Zero Prohibited
comboRules.text: Give a serious lecture on how to manufacture a daisy cigarette. Be technical and unnecessarily precise.
comboRules.characterComment: Botanical science serving culinary art. Fascinating.

comboRules.title: Romantic Four-Two
comboRules.text: Recite a love poem to the nearest plant. If there is no plant, choose a piece of furniture.

comboRules.title: Hazy Four-Two
comboRules.text: Explain for thirty seconds why clouds are actually the gentrification of the sky.

comboRules.title: Prohibited Four-Two
comboRules.text: Found an imaginary pro-haze association. Give it a name, mission, slogan and monthly membership fee.

comboRules.title: Four Fog Zero
comboRules.text: Speak enthusiastically for forty-five seconds about your imaginary passion for sustainable forest mushrooms.

comboRules.title: Four Zero Prohibited
comboRules.text: Create an imaginary government form requesting permission to play saxophone after 10 p.m.

comboRules.title: Two Zero Cloud
comboRules.text: Name five cloud types in invented Latin and describe their supposed effects on human behaviour.

comboRules.title: Two Zero Heart
comboRules.text: Invent a hazy horoscope for every person at the table.

comboRules.title: Double Heart Zero
comboRules.text: Explain why the dinosaurs disappeared. The official scientific answer is forbidden.

comboRules.title: Double Haze Four
comboRules.text: Pitch a three-season TV series about a tax inspector who smokes chamomile.

comboRules.title: Double Prohibited Four
comboRules.text: Defend a client accused of thinking too much. Deliver a forty-five-second courtroom speech.

comboRules.title: Four Cloud Heart
comboRules.text: Invent a cocktail made from imaginary garden herbs and describe its effects with medical seriousness.

comboRules.title: Zero Haze Prohibited
comboRules.text: Draft a petition demanding that Wednesdays become more blurry. Collect signatures at the table.

comboRules.title: Zero Heart Cloud
comboRules.text: Run for Minister of Sustainable Haze and present your political programme in forty-five seconds.

comboRules.title: Four Prohibited Zero
comboRules.text: Perform an extremely enthusiastic unboxing of an imaginary box containing absolutely nothing.

comboRules.title: Two Cloud Zero
comboRules.text: Explain sincerely why pigeons are part of a government surveillance network.
